entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The target crop, Arachis hypogaea L., used for marker identification.

entities.name: DDRADSEQ
entities.description: Double digest restriction site-associated DNA sequencing used to identify InDel markers.

entities.name: INDEL MARKERS
entities.description: Insertion-deletion markers developed to assess genetic diversity in peanut.

entities.name: BIOINFORMATIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The computational process used to analyze sequencing data and identify InDels.

entities.name: CODING SEQUENCES
entities.description: Regions of the genome that translate into proteins, where some InDels were located.

entities.name: GENOMICS-LED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy utilizing genomic information to improve crop traits.

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric (PIC) used to quantify the informativeness of genetic markers.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to select for desired traits in breeding programs.

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing technologies that enable rapid genome analysis.
